text_original: so ugly game.. it doesn't have unlimited chats ew
text_zh: 这游戏太丑了.. 居然没有无限聊天 呕
reply_original: Hi, I'm sorry to hear you're disappointed. High-quality AI requires high server costs, so unlimited chat is a VIP feature, but you can earn free gems via daily tasks. We'd love to improve our design based on your feedback. Please share your thoughts or issues with us at support@fantachat.ai. We want to make this better for you!
reply_zh: 您好，得知您感到失望，我们深表歉意。高质量的AI需要高昂的服务器成本，因此无限聊天是一项VIP功能，但您可以通过每日任务赚取免费宝石。我们非常乐意根据您的反馈来改进我们的设计。请通过 support@fantachat.ai 与我们分享您的想法或遇到的问题。我们希望能为您做得更好！
